---
title: "Session 6: Best practices"
pagetitle: "Session 6"
---

# Best practices for data science in transport planning

This session covers version control and reproducible research.

## Learning objectives

- Use Git for version control
- Collaborate with GitHub
- Create reproducible reports with Quarto
- Document your workflow

## Git workflow

```bash
# Initialise a repository
git init

# Stage and commit changes
git add .
git commit -m "Initial commit"

# Push to GitHub
git push origin main
```

## Quarto documents

```markdown
---
title: "My analysis"
format: html
---

# Introduction

This is a reproducible document.
```
